name: Sentry Ward
description: A form of plant originally grown in the garden of a fearful king.

abilities.name: Plant
abilities.description: Attacks against Sentry Wards cannot miss. Melee units have an increased attack range when attacking Sentry Wards. Cooldown: 1. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 500. Vision Radius: 150. Vision Duration: 12. Ward Duration: 420. The player that placed the ward can always attack it with any of their units. However, all their attacks are treated as non-hero attacks, until the ward comes within the 50% deny range.
